description: HFI Systems - Deye SUN-5K Dual Inverter Monitoring v2

panels.description: Current battery state of charge as a percentage. Sourced from the battery BMS via the inverter.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, battery_soc
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND battery_soc IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Battery SOC

panels.description: Current battery terminal voltage. Indicates charge level — fully charged is typically 54–55V for a 48V LiFePO4 bank.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, battery_voltage
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND battery_voltage IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Battery Voltage

panels.description: Combined solar PV output across all inverters at the latest poll. Sum of all MPPT strings.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  SUM(latest_pv) as "Total PV (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name,
    pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power, 0) as latest_pv
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND pv1_power IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
) sub

panels.title: Total Solar Power

panels.description: Combined grid power draw across all inverters. Positive = importing from grid.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  SUM(latest_grid) as "Grid Power (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name,
    grid_power as latest_grid
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND grid_power IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
) sub

panels.title: Grid Power (Combined)

panels.description: Internal temperature of the first inverter's power stage. Normal operating range is 40–75°C.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, inverter_temp
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND inverter_temp IS NOT NULL
AND inverter_temp < 100
ORDER BY inverter_name ASC, time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Inverter 1 Temp

panels.description: Total solar energy generated today across all inverters. Resets at midnight.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  SUM(val) as "Today PV (kWh)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name, daily_pv_energy as val
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_pv_energy IS NOT NULL
  AND daily_pv_energy > 0
  AND daily_pv_energy < 100
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
)

panels.title: Today PV Energy

panels.description: Estimated cost of grid electricity imported today. Calculated using City of Tshwane IBT tariff (incl 15% VAT) or flat rate — switchable via the Cost Calc Mode dropdown.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  CASE
  WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN
    ROUND((grid_kwh * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
  ELSE
    ROUND((
      CASE
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 0   THEN 0
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 100 THEN grid_kwh * 2.9790
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (grid_kwh-100)*3.4864
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (grid_kwh-400)*3.7983
        ELSE                      100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (grid_kwh-650)*4.0948
      END * 1.15
    )::numeric, 2)
  END as "Today Grid Cost (R)"
FROM (
  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(val), 0) as grid_kwh
  FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name, daily_grid_import as val
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_grid_import IS NOT NULL
  AND daily_grid_import >= 0
  AND daily_grid_import < 500
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
)
) g

panels.title: Today Grid Cost

panels.description: Percentage of today's total load that was met by solar and battery without grid power. 100% = fully off-grid today. Formula: (1 − grid_import ÷ total_load) × 100.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  ROUND(
    CASE WHEN load_kwh > 0
    THEN LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, (1 - grid_kwh / NULLIF(load_kwh, 0)) * 100))
    ELSE 0 END
  ::numeric, 1) as "Self Sufficiency (%)"
FROM (
  SELECT
    COALESCE((SELECT MAX(val) FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name, daily_load_energy as val
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_load_energy IS NOT NULL
  AND daily_load_energy > 0
  AND daily_load_energy < 200
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
)), 1) as load_kwh,
    COALESCE((SELECT MAX(val) FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name, daily_grid_import as val
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_grid_import IS NOT NULL
  AND daily_grid_import >= 0
  AND daily_grid_import < 500
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
)), 0) as grid_kwh
) t

panels.title: Self-Sufficiency Today

panels.description: Battery pack temperature reported by the BMS. High temperatures (>45°C) may indicate heavy charge/discharge cycles.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, battery_temp
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND battery_temp IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Battery Temp

panels.description: Total load power being consumed across all inverters at the latest poll.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  SUM(latest_load) as "Total Load (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name,
    load_power as latest_load
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND load_power IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
) sub

panels.title: Total Load

panels.description: Grid supply voltage as measured by Inverter 1. Normal range for SA is 220–240V.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, grid_voltage
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND grid_voltage IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Grid Voltage

panels.description: Internal temperature of the second inverter's power stage.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, inverter_temp
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND (SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(inverters), 0) FROM sites WHERE site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}) > 1
AND inverter_temp IS NOT NULL
AND inverter_temp < 100
ORDER BY inverter_name DESC, time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Inverter 2 Temp

panels.description: Total load energy consumed today across all inverters. Resets at midnight.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  MAX(val) as "Today Load (kWh)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name, daily_load_energy as val
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_load_energy IS NOT NULL
  AND daily_load_energy > 0
  AND daily_load_energy < 200
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
)

panels.title: Today Load Energy

panels.description: Estimated savings from solar generation today — the cost you avoided by not importing this energy from the grid.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  CASE
  WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN
    ROUND(((load_kwh - grid_kwh) * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
  ELSE
    ROUND((
      (CASE
        WHEN load_kwh <= 0   THEN 0
        WHEN load_kwh <= 100 THEN load_kwh * 2.9790
        WHEN load_kwh <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (load_kwh-100)*3.4864
        WHEN load_kwh <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (load_kwh-400)*3.7983
        ELSE                      100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (load_kwh-650)*4.0948
      END
      -
      CASE
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 0   THEN 0
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 100 THEN grid_kwh * 2.9790
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (grid_kwh-100)*3.4864
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (grid_kwh-400)*3.7983
        ELSE                      100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (grid_kwh-650)*4.0948
      END) * 1.15
    )::numeric, 2)
  END as "Today Solar Savings (R)"
FROM (
  SELECT
    COALESCE((SELECT MAX(val) FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name, daily_load_energy as val
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_load_energy IS NOT NULL
  AND daily_load_energy > 0
  AND daily_load_energy < 200
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
)), 1) as load_kwh,
    COALESCE((SELECT MAX(val) FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name, daily_grid_import as val
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_grid_import IS NOT NULL
  AND daily_grid_import >= 0
  AND daily_grid_import < 500
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
)), 0) as grid_kwh
) t

panels.title: Today Solar Savings

panels.description: Solar PV power output over time, one line per inverter. Shows generation profile throughout the day.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  inverter_name,
  AVG(pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power,0)) as "PV Power (W)"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  minute AS time,
  SUM(avg_pv) as "Combined Total (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) as minute,
    inverter_name,
    AVG(pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power, 0)) as avg_pv
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  GROUP BY 1, 2
) sub
GROUP BY minute ORDER BY minute

panels.title: Solar PV Power — Per Inverter & Combined

panels.description: Battery charge/discharge power (positive = charging, negative = discharging) and state of charge percentage over time.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  minute AS time,
  AVG(soc)         as "SOC (%)",
  SUM(avg_batt) * -1 as "Battery Power (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) as minute,
    inverter_name,
    AVG(battery_soc)   as soc,
    AVG(battery_power) as avg_batt
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  GROUP BY 1, 2
) sub
GROUP BY minute ORDER BY minute

panels.title: Battery Power & SOC

panels.description: Load power consumption over time, one line per inverter.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  inverter_name,
  AVG(load_power) as "Load Power (W)"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  minute AS time,
  SUM(avg_load) as "Combined Load (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) as minute,
    inverter_name,
    AVG(load_power) as avg_load
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  GROUP BY 1, 2
) sub
GROUP BY minute ORDER BY minute

panels.title: Load Power — Per Inverter & Combined

panels.description: Combined grid power draw (W) and grid voltage (V) over time. Power near zero indicates the system is running on solar/battery.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  minute AS time,
  SUM(avg_grid)    as "Grid Power (W)",
  AVG(avg_voltage) as "Grid Voltage (V)"
FROM (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) as minute,
    inverter_name,
    AVG(grid_power)   as avg_grid,
    AVG(grid_voltage) as avg_voltage
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  GROUP BY 1, 2
) sub
GROUP BY minute ORDER BY minute

panels.title: Grid Power & Voltage

panels.description: Grid frequency over time. Eskom nominal is 50Hz. Deviations indicate grid instability.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  AVG(grid_frequency) as "Grid Frequency (Hz)"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND grid_frequency BETWEEN 45 AND 55
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Grid Frequency — Eskom Quality

panels.description: Inverter and DC heatsink temperatures over time for all inverters, plus battery temperature.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  inverter_name,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_temp < 100 THEN inverter_temp END) as "Inverter Temp (°C)",
  AVG(CASE WHEN dc_temp < 100 THEN dc_temp END)             as "DC Temp (°C)",
  AVG(CASE WHEN battery_temp IS NOT NULL AND battery_temp > 0 THEN battery_temp END) as "Battery Temp (°C)"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Inverter Temperatures

panels.description: Combined PV power output (left axis) vs cloud cover % and solar radiation W/m² (right axis). Shows the direct relationship between cloud cover and solar generation. Weather updates every 15 min.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  minute AS time,
  SUM(avg_pv) AS "Combined PV (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS minute,
    inverter_name,
    AVG(pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power, 0)) AS avg_pv
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  GROUP BY 1, 2
) inv
GROUP BY minute ORDER BY minute

SELECT time, cloud_cover AS "Cloud Cover (%)"
FROM weather_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
ORDER BY time

SELECT time, solar_rad AS "Solar Rad (W/m²)"
FROM weather_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
ORDER BY time

panels.title: ☁️ Cloud Cover & Solar Radiation vs Combined PV Power

panels.description: Battery current (A) and voltage (V) for the first inverter over time. Positive current = charging, negative = discharging.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  AVG(battery_current) as "Battery Current (A)",
  AVG(battery_voltage) as "Battery Voltage (V)"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND inverter_name = (SELECT MIN(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Battery Amps & Voltage — Inverter 1

panels.description: Battery current (A) and voltage (V) for the second inverter over time.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  AVG(battery_current) as "Battery Current (A)",
  AVG(battery_voltage) as "Battery Voltage (V)"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND inverter_name = (SELECT MAX(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
AND (SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(inverters), 0) FROM sites WHERE site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}) > 1
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Battery Amps & Voltage — Inverter 2

panels.description: Daily grid electricity cost for the last 14 days. Calculated from daily_grid_import counter using selected tariff mode.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'))
    DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')::text as day,
    daily_grid_import as kwh
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE inverter_name = (SELECT MIN(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
  AND daily_grid_import IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'), time DESC
)
SELECT day, CASE
      WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN ROUND((kwh * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
      ELSE ROUND((
        CASE
          WHEN kwh <= 0   THEN 0
          WHEN kwh <= 100 THEN kwh * 2.9790
          WHEN kwh <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (kwh-100)*3.4864
          WHEN kwh <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (kwh-400)*3.7983
          ELSE                    100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (kwh-650)*4.0948
        END * 1.15
      )::numeric, 2)
    END as "Grid Cost (R)"
FROM daily ORDER BY day

panels.title: Daily Grid Cost — Last 14 Days

panels.description: Daily solar savings for the last 14 days — the cost of electricity you generated yourself instead of buying from the grid.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily AS (
  SELECT day, SUM(eod_pv) as pv_kwh
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'), inverter_name)
    DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')::text as day,
    inverter_name,
    daily_pv_energy as eod_pv
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_pv_energy IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'), inverter_name, time DESC
) sub
GROUP BY day
)
SELECT day, CASE
      WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN ROUND((pv_kwh * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
      ELSE ROUND((
        CASE
          WHEN pv_kwh <= 0   THEN 0
          WHEN pv_kwh <= 100 THEN pv_kwh * 2.9790
          WHEN pv_kwh <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (pv_kwh-100)*3.4864
          WHEN pv_kwh <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (pv_kwh-400)*3.7983
          ELSE                    100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (pv_kwh-650)*4.0948
        END * 1.15
      )::numeric, 2)
    END as "Solar Savings (R)"
FROM daily ORDER BY day

panels.title: Daily Solar Savings — Last 14 Days

panels.description: 30-day comparison of actual grid cost vs solar savings. Shows the financial value of the solar installation over time.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_grid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'))
    DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')::text as day,
    daily_grid_import as grid_kwh
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE inverter_name = (SELECT MIN(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  AND daily_grid_import IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'), time DESC
),
daily_pv AS (
  SELECT day, SUM(eod_pv) as pv_kwh
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'), inverter_name)
      DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')::text as day,
      inverter_name,
      daily_pv_energy as eod_pv
    FROM solar_readings
    WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
    AND daily_pv_energy IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'), inverter_name, time DESC
  ) sub
  GROUP BY day
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(g.day, p.day) as day,
  CASE
      WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN ROUND((COALESCE(g.grid_kwh, 0) * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
      ELSE ROUND((
        CASE
          WHEN COALESCE(g.grid_kwh, 0) <= 0   THEN 0
          WHEN COALESCE(g.grid_kwh, 0) <= 100 THEN COALESCE(g.grid_kwh, 0) * 2.9790
          WHEN COALESCE(g.grid_kwh, 0) <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (COALESCE(g.grid_kwh, 0)-100)*3.4864
          WHEN COALESCE(g.grid_kwh, 0) <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (COALESCE(g.grid_kwh, 0)-400)*3.7983
          ELSE                    100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (COALESCE(g.grid_kwh, 0)-650)*4.0948
        END * 1.15
      )::numeric, 2)
    END as "Grid Cost (R)",
  CASE
      WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN ROUND((COALESCE(p.pv_kwh, 0) * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
      ELSE ROUND((
        CASE
          WHEN COALESCE(p.pv_kwh, 0) <= 0   THEN 0
          WHEN COALESCE(p.pv_kwh, 0) <= 100 THEN COALESCE(p.pv_kwh, 0) * 2.9790
          WHEN COALESCE(p.pv_kwh, 0) <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (COALESCE(p.pv_kwh, 0)-100)*3.4864
          WHEN COALESCE(p.pv_kwh, 0) <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (COALESCE(p.pv_kwh, 0)-400)*3.7983
          ELSE                    100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (COALESCE(p.pv_kwh, 0)-650)*4.0948
        END * 1.15
      )::numeric, 2)
    END   as "Solar Savings (R)"
FROM daily_grid g
FULL OUTER JOIN daily_pv p ON g.day = p.day
ORDER BY COALESCE(g.day, p.day)

panels.title: Daily Grid Cost vs Solar Savings — Last 30 Days

panels.description: Combined daily energy summary across all inverters. PV Generated = total solar production. Load Consumed = total consumption. Grid Import = total grid draw. Batt Charge/Discharge = battery throughput.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  day::date::timestamp as time,
  day,
  SUM(eod_pv)         as "PV Generated",
  MAX(eod_load)       as "Load Consumed",
  MAX(eod_grid)       as "Grid Import",
  SUM(eod_batt_chg)   as "Batt Charge",
  SUM(eod_batt_dis)   as "Batt Discharge"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'), inverter_name)
    DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')::text as day,
    inverter_name,
    daily_pv_energy         as eod_pv,
    daily_load_energy       as eod_load,
    daily_grid_import       as eod_grid,
    daily_battery_charge    as eod_batt_chg,
    daily_battery_discharge as eod_batt_dis
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_pv_energy IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'), inverter_name, time DESC
) sub
GROUP BY day
ORDER BY day

panels.title: Daily Energy — Combined Site (Last 14 Days)

panels.description: Daily energy counters for the first inverter over the last 14 days.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  (DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'))::timestamp as time,
  DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')::text as day,
  daily_pv_energy         as "PV Generated",
  daily_load_energy       as "Load Consumed",
  daily_grid_import       as "Grid Import",
  daily_battery_charge    as "Batt Charge",
  daily_battery_discharge as "Batt Discharge"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'))
    time,
    daily_pv_energy, daily_load_energy, daily_grid_import,
    daily_battery_charge, daily_battery_discharge
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE inverter_name = (SELECT MIN(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
  AND daily_pv_energy IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'), time DESC
) sub
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Daily Energy — Inverter 1 (Last 14 Days)

panels.description: Daily energy counters for the second inverter over the last 14 days. Grid Import not shown as it is always zero for slave inverters in a parallel configuration.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  (DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'))::timestamp as time,
  DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')::text as day,
  daily_pv_energy         as "PV Generated",
  daily_load_energy       as "Load Consumed",
  daily_battery_charge    as "Batt Charge",
  daily_battery_discharge as "Batt Discharge"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'))
    time,
    daily_pv_energy, daily_load_energy,
    daily_battery_charge, daily_battery_discharge
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE inverter_name = (SELECT MAX(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
  AND (SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(inverters), 0) FROM sites WHERE site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}) > 1
  AND daily_pv_energy IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'), time DESC
) sub
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Daily Energy — Inverter 2 (Last 14 Days)

panels.description: Peak combined solar output recorded today across all inverters.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  COALESCE(MAX(minute_total), 0) as "Peak PV (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT ts, SUM(avg_pv) as minute_total
  FROM (
    SELECT
      DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) as ts,
      inverter_name,
      AVG(pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power, 0)) as avg_pv
    FROM solar_readings
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
    AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
    AND (pv1_power > 0 OR COALESCE(pv2_power, 0) > 0)
    GROUP BY 1, 2
  ) inv
  GROUP BY ts
) sub

panels.title: Peak Solar Today

panels.description: Peak combined load recorded today across all inverters.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  COALESCE(MAX(minute_total), 0) as "Peak Load (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT ts,
    SUM(avg_load) as minute_total
  FROM (
    SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) as ts,
      inverter_name,
      AVG(load_power) as avg_load
    FROM solar_readings
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
    AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
    GROUP BY 1, 2
  ) inv
  GROUP BY ts
) sub

panels.title: Peak Load Today

panels.description: Number of failed poll attempts in the last hour. Non-zero values indicate connectivity issues to inverter dongles.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  COUNT(*) as "Failed Polls"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND poll_success = false

panels.title: Poll Failures (Last Hour)

panels.description: Total solar energy generated this calendar month across all inverters.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  SUM(eod_pv) as "PV Generated (kWh)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'), inverter_name)
    DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') as day,
    inverter_name,
    daily_pv_energy as eod_pv
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') = DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_pv_energy IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'), inverter_name, time DESC
) sub

panels.title: This Month — PV Generated

panels.description: Total grid electricity cost this calendar month using selected tariff.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  SUM(CASE
      WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN ROUND((kwh * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
      ELSE ROUND((
        CASE
          WHEN kwh <= 0   THEN 0
          WHEN kwh <= 100 THEN kwh * 2.9790
          WHEN kwh <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (kwh-100)*3.4864
          WHEN kwh <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (kwh-400)*3.7983
          ELSE                    100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (kwh-650)*4.0948
        END * 1.15
      )::numeric, 2)
    END) as "Grid Cost (R)"
FROM (
  SELECT DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') as day,
    MAX(daily_grid_import) as kwh
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE inverter_name = (SELECT MIN(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND DATE_TRUNC('month', time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') = DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')
  AND daily_grid_import BETWEEN 0.01 AND 9000
  GROUP BY 1
) sub

panels.title: This Month — Grid Cost

panels.description: Estimated value of all PV energy generated this month at current rate. Note: this is the gross value of PV generated, not net savings (which deducts grid cost).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  CASE
      WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN ROUND((pv_total * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
      ELSE ROUND((
        CASE
          WHEN pv_total <= 0   THEN 0
          WHEN pv_total <= 100 THEN pv_total * 2.9790
          WHEN pv_total <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (pv_total-100)*3.4864
          WHEN pv_total <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (pv_total-400)*3.7983
          ELSE                    100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (pv_total-650)*4.0948
        END * 1.15
      )::numeric, 2)
    END as "Solar Savings (R)"
FROM (
  SELECT SUM(eod_pv) as pv_total
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'), inverter_name)
      DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') as day,
      inverter_name,
      daily_pv_energy as eod_pv
    FROM solar_readings
    WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') = DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')
    AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
    AND daily_pv_energy IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'), inverter_name, time DESC
  ) sub
) t

panels.title: This Month — PV Value (R)

panels.description: Grid power draw per inverter over time. Useful for diagnosing unbalanced loading between inverters.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  inverter_name,
  AVG(grid_power) as "Grid Power (W)"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Grid Power — Per Inverter

panels.description: Daily battery charge vs discharge balance for the last 14 days. Green = charged into battery, Blue = discharged from battery.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')::text as day,
  daily_battery_charge    as "Charged (kWh)",
  daily_battery_discharge as "Discharged (kWh)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'))
    time,
    daily_battery_charge, daily_battery_discharge
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE inverter_name = (SELECT MIN(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
  AND daily_battery_charge IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY DATE(time AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg'), time DESC
) sub
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Daily Battery Balance (Charge vs Discharge)

panels.description: Live PV string 1 voltage for the first inverter.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, pv1_voltage
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND inverter_name = (SELECT MIN(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
AND pv1_voltage IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Inv 1 — PV1 Voltage

panels.description: Live PV string 1 current for the first inverter.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, pv1_current
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND inverter_name = (SELECT MIN(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
AND pv1_current IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Inv 1 — PV1 Current

panels.description: Live PV string 1 power for the first inverter.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, pv1_power
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND inverter_name = (SELECT MIN(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
AND pv1_power IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Inv 1 — PV1 Power

panels.description: Live PV string 2 voltage for the first inverter.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, pv2_voltage
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND inverter_name = (SELECT MIN(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
AND pv2_voltage IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Inv 1 — PV2 Voltage

panels.description: Live PV string 2 current for the first inverter.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, pv2_current
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND inverter_name = (SELECT MIN(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
AND pv2_current IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Inv 1 — PV2 Current

panels.description: Live PV string 2 power for the first inverter.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, pv2_power
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND inverter_name = (SELECT MIN(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
AND pv2_power IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Inv 1 — PV2 Power

panels.description: Live PV string 1 voltage for the second inverter.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, pv1_voltage
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND (SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(inverters), 0) FROM sites WHERE site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}) > 1
AND inverter_name = (SELECT MAX(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
AND pv1_voltage IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Inv 2 — PV1 Voltage

panels.description: Live PV string 1 current for the second inverter.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, pv1_current
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND (SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(inverters), 0) FROM sites WHERE site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}) > 1
AND inverter_name = (SELECT MAX(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
AND pv1_current IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Inv 2 — PV1 Current

panels.description: Live PV string 1 power for the second inverter.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, pv1_power
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND (SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(inverters), 0) FROM sites WHERE site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}) > 1
AND inverter_name = (SELECT MAX(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
AND pv1_power IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Inv 2 — PV1 Power

panels.description: Live PV string 2 voltage for the second inverter. Low voltage (< 20V) indicates string is inactive or shaded.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, pv2_voltage
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND (SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(inverters), 0) FROM sites WHERE site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}) > 1
AND inverter_name = (SELECT MAX(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
AND pv2_voltage IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Inv 2 — PV2 Voltage

panels.description: Live PV string 2 current for the second inverter.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, pv2_current
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND (SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(inverters), 0) FROM sites WHERE site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}) > 1
AND inverter_name = (SELECT MAX(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
AND pv2_current IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Inv 2 — PV2 Current

panels.description: Live PV string 2 power for the second inverter.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, pv2_power
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND (SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(inverters), 0) FROM sites WHERE site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}) > 1
AND inverter_name = (SELECT MAX(inverter_name) FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote})
AND pv2_power IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Inv 2 — PV2 Power

panels.description: PV string voltages over time for all active strings. Voltage drops indicate shading, cloud cover, or end of day.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  inverter_name || ' — String 1' as "String",
  AVG(NULLIF(pv1_voltage, 0)) as "Voltage (V)"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
GROUP BY 1, 2
UNION ALL
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  inverter_name || ' — String 2' as "String",
  AVG(CASE WHEN pv2_voltage > 10 THEN pv2_voltage END) as "Voltage (V)"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND pv2_voltage > 10
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: PV String Voltages — All Active Strings

panels.description: PV string power output over time for all active strings. Useful for comparing string performance and detecting underperformance.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  inverter_name || ' — String 1' as "String",
  AVG(NULLIF(pv1_power, 0)) as "Power (W)"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
GROUP BY 1, 2
UNION ALL
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  inverter_name || ' — String 2' as "String",
  AVG(CASE WHEN pv2_power > 0 THEN pv2_power END) as "Power (W)"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND pv2_power > 0
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: PV String Power — All Active Strings

panels.description: Latest 50 raw readings from the database, newest first. Shows live values directly from inverter Modbus registers.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time,
  inverter_name,
  battery_soc,
  battery_voltage,
  ROUND(battery_power::numeric, 0) as battery_power_w,
  battery_temp,
  pv1_power,
  pv2_power,
  load_power,
  grid_power as grid_power_raw,
  ROUND((grid_power * 0.001)::numeric, 2) as grid_power_kw,
  grid_voltage,
  grid_frequency,
  inverter_temp,
  dc_temp,
  poll_success
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Latest Readings

panels.description: Most recent weather conditions at each site. Cloud cover drives solar generation.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT site_name AS "Site", temp_c AS "Temp"
FROM weather_readings
WHERE time = (SELECT MAX(time) FROM weather_readings w2 WHERE w2.site_name = weather_readings.site_name)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
ORDER BY site_name

panels.title: 🌡️ Air Temperature

panels.description: Cloud cover %. Higher cloud = lower PV output. Explains solar underperformance.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT site_name AS "Site", cloud_cover AS "Cloud Cover"
FROM weather_readings
WHERE time = (SELECT MAX(time) FROM weather_readings w2 WHERE w2.site_name = weather_readings.site_name)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
ORDER BY site_name

panels.title: ☁️ Cloud Cover

panels.description: Shortwave solar radiation W/m². Direct proxy for expected PV output. 0 = no sun.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT site_name AS "Site", solar_rad AS "Solar Radiation (W/m²)"
FROM weather_readings
WHERE time = (SELECT MAX(time) FROM weather_readings w2 WHERE w2.site_name = weather_readings.site_name)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
ORDER BY site_name

panels.title: ☀️ Solar Radiation

panels.description: Wind speed, humidity and UV index at the site.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT wind_speed AS "Wind (km/h)", humidity AS "Humidity", uv_index AS "UV Index"
FROM weather_readings
WHERE site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: 💨 Wind · Humidity · UV

panels.description: Cloud cover % (right axis) overlaid with combined PV power (left axis). Shows the direct relationship between cloud cover and solar generation.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT minute AS time, SUM(avg_pv) AS "PV Power (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS minute,
    inverter_name,
    AVG(pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power, 0)) AS avg_pv
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  GROUP BY 1, 2
) inv
GROUP BY minute ORDER BY minute

SELECT
  time,
  cloud_cover AS "Cloud Cover (%)"
FROM weather_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  time,
  solar_rad AS "Solar Radiation (W/m²)"
FROM weather_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
ORDER BY time

panels.title: ☁️ Cloud Cover & Solar Radiation vs PV Power

panels.description: Ambient air temperature and humidity history. High ambient temps can affect inverter and battery performance.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time,
  temp_c AS "Ambient Temp (°C)",
  feels_like_c AS "Feels Like (°C)"
FROM weather_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  time,
  humidity AS "Humidity (%)"
FROM weather_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
ORDER BY time

panels.title: 🌡️ Ambient Temperature & Humidity

panels.description: Wind speed and UV index over time. UV index correlates with solar irradiance quality.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time,
  wind_speed AS "Wind Speed (km/h)"
FROM weather_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  time,
  uv_index AS "UV Index"
FROM weather_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
ORDER BY time

panels.title: 💨 Wind Speed & UV Index

panels.description: Rainfall mm per reading interval. Rain generally improves panel efficiency (cleaning) but indicates overcast conditions.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time,
  precipitation AS "Precipitation (mm)"
FROM weather_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND precipitation > 0
ORDER BY time

panels.title: 🌧️ Precipitation

panels.description: Highest combined grid import power in any single minute today. Indicates peak demand events.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() AS time,
  COALESCE(MAX(minute_total), 0) AS "Peak Grid Draw (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT ts, SUM(avg_grid) AS minute_total
  FROM (
    SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS ts, inverter_name,
      AVG(CASE WHEN grid_power > 0 THEN grid_power ELSE 0 END) AS avg_grid
    FROM solar_readings
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
    AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
    GROUP BY 1, 2
  ) inv
  GROUP BY ts
) sub

panels.title: 🔌 Peak Grid Draw Today

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT site_name FROM solar_readings ORDER BY site_name
list.label: Site
list.name: site
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT site_name FROM solar_readings ORDER BY site_name

list.definition: SELECT jsonb_array_length(inverters)::text FROM sites WHERE site_name ILIKE '${site}'
list.label: Inverter Count
list.name: inv_count
list.query: SELECT jsonb_array_length(inverters)::text FROM sites WHERE site_name ILIKE '${site}'

title: SolarWatch — Solar Monitoring
